description: This is a complete HTML file implementing a web-based database visualizer interface, including layout, styling, and client-side JavaScript for fetching and displaying database information.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches the list of databases and populates the sidebar with clickable entries.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the list of databases and resets the UI state.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses database entries in the sidebar and loads associated tables.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Fetches the tables for a selected database and displays them in the sidebar.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Fetches data for a selected table and displays it in the main content area.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Renders the table data into an HTML table, handling wide content and object values.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Generates HTML for individual cell values, with special handling for nulls, objects, and long strings.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content to show full data or truncate it.
